Notes: Cisco CCNA Exploration Modules 1 and 2, Programming in C, or assembly language applied on Intel 8085, OO-Programming in Java, followed by Mathematics and Electrical engineering, are the most interesting courses available in the first year at the ADV.   The second year involves finding an internship at a company that the ADV board agrees. In order to pass this second year, a thesis describing your role in developing a company project must be written. My thesis named "Alpine Curve Editor" was graded with maximum score 1.0.  IT Project Management, Software Modelling Techniques (UML, GRASP rules, design patterns), Distributed Systems with Java, Database Development with SQL and Java JDBC, Robot-Programming, Operating Systems (Linux), Industrial Management and Regulation and Control are the skills I developed in the 2013-2014 year of study at ADV. This alongside Cisco CCNA Exploration Modules 3 and 4.
Degree Name: Training as a certified computer specialist

School Name: National College of Computer Science "Spiru Haret", Suceava
